UK Crime Files: Tracking a Serial Killer

programmes.show_description: Carole Waugh returned to London and fell for a fraudster who was determined to get her money. S1, Ep4
In 2012 in the UK, Suzanne Van Hagen meets a violent man online. A year later, she's found dead. Her family fights to prove it wasn't a sex game gone wrong. S1, Ep3
Nick Knowles tells the emotional story of a dad, and his 12 year old daughter, lost overnight on a glacier in freezing temperatures. S5, Ep11/20
Two young men are attempting to set a world record rowing the Atlantic, when a freak wave capsizes their boat. S5, Ep10/20
Nick Knowles tells the story of two best friends who plunge down a cliff face in Cornwall on a late night walk. S5, Ep12/20
Nick Knowles tells the story of a professional British cyclist involved in a horrific collision with a race support vehicle. S5, Ep13/20
Innovative, value-for-money products brought directly to you at home. Shop 'til you drop whilst avoiding the hustle and bustle of the High Street.
A dog loses an eye while in kennel care because the animal was allegedly fed out of the same bowl as another pet and a dogfight ensued. S22, Ep227
A young vacationer seals his fate when he offers video evidence showing himself sailing over a man's roof on his snowmobile. S22, Ep228
A woman and her girlfriend claim ex-roommates backed out of their lease after an air quality issue that sent them all to a hotel. S22, Ep229
Divorcees lay out 10K to hire the best possible lawyer for their child then dispute who owes for that costly decision. S22, Ep230
A woman with a protective order against her ex-fiancé says she was too scared to call the police when he hit her vehicle with his car. S20, Ep9
Armed with a bat and a Pit Bull, a woman's stroll around the block ends with an attack by an unleashed dog and alleged ridicule from the pet's owner. S20, Ep10
An assault during a custody exchange at McDonald's takes place after a babysitter serves the mother of her client's children with papers alleging abuse. S20, Ep11
A dog-walking dispute escalates into a full-blown assault when a woman pepper sprays a puppy and its owners; she claims they beat her up in return. S20, Ep12
A man gets into an altercation with his roommate and claims he was shoved into a television; his roommate accuses him of being drunk and belligerent. S24, Ep83
It comes as no surprise that when a woman becomes intimate with both of her male roommates, their living arrangement is doomed. S24, Ep84
A woman with three children is taken in by a friend but allegedly must commit a crime as payback for a place to stay. S24, Ep85
A woman purchases an 11K car for her fiancé then repossesses it two days later after finding him with another woman. S23, Ep2
The Judge takes a woman's allegations against her boss very seriously; she is shocked to discover the real story. S23, Ep3
Ex-lovers get into a heated battle over the thermostat, which ends in a fight over moving costs and an allegedly stolen dog. S23, Ep4
A food consultant sues her cookbook co-author for payment for work on her book; her co-author said the book never made a profit. S23, Ep5
When three unsupervised children annoy a roommate, an alleged assault takes place and a restraining order comes into play. S23, Ep6
A man hunts down the alleged family that stole his dirt bike from his backyard and damaged it; they claim it was a legit gift for their teen. S23, Ep7
A woman is sued for the unpaid balance on a car; she claims her friend bought two cars and she was hiding one from her family. S23, Ep8
The Judge warns litigants not to enter her courtroom unless they have clean hands; both parties learn her lesson the hard way in their ensuing eviction battle. S20, Ep25
When a woman's hair starts to fall out immediately after a treatment, she blames her hairdresser; he blames her self-colouring attempts to cover grey hair. S20, Ep26
Unhappy with a crowded parking lot, a salon owner tells police that the church next door deals drugs causing them to lose summer funding. S20, Ep27
Ex friends fight over custody of Gonzo the dog after a new baby arrives on the scene and a restraining order comes into play. S20, Ep28

programmes.show_description: In 2017, Ellen Higginbottom was murdered by Mark Buckley in Orrell Water Park, Wigan. After fleeing the scene with her laptop and phone, Buckley was caught by police. S1, Ep4
Police officer Martin Forshaw kills fiancé, Claire Howarth, in Greater Manchester, just days before their wedding. His poor staging of a car crash led to a life sentence. S1, Ep6
Hollie Gazzard, a young hairdresser from the UK, was hoping for a fresh start but was tragically killed by her ex, leaving her family and community devastated. S1, Ep4

Teenagers rumoured to have a history with the police are accused of damaging their own apartment; their mother is sued for repairs. S22, Ep247

programmes.show_description: In this episode, we explore the tragic murder of 18-year-old Lily Sullivan in Pembroke, Wales. After a brief encounter with 31-year-old Lewis Haines, Lily's life was cut short. S1, Ep5
Donald Hume murdered his business partner Stanley Setty following an altercation that saw the killer's dog being kicked. S7, Ep6
Years after David Clarke's death, a confession tape reveals a betrayal between feuding neighbours in the UK. S1, Ep5
